ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (ticker) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value indicating the stock's volatility */,
  "52_week_high" REAL /* 52-week high price */,
  "52_week_low" REAL /* 52-week low price */,
  "earnings_per_share" REAL /* Earnings per share (EPS) */,
  "price_earnings_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio (P/E ratio) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the price data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the stock */,
  "after_hours_price" REAL /* After-hours price of the stock */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "volume_change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in volume from the previous day */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data (e.g., exchange, third-party provider) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for SMS notifications */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the portfolio was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the portfolio was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the holding belongs to */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock held in the portfolio */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares held */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the shares were purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the shares were purchased */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the holding */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average cost of the holding */,
  "total_return" REAL /* Total return on the holding */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the holding was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, price decrease) */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value at which the alert should be triggered */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was created */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was triggered */,
  "notification_sent" INTEGER /* Indicates if a notification has been sent for this alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that triggered the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS, push) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Delivery status of the notification (e.g., delivered, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., performance, risk analysis) */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last updated */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of user IDs with whom the report is shared */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level for the report (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose preferences are stored */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone preference for the user */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language preference for the user */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Preferred type of chart (e.g., line, candlestick) */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of alerts (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of receiving notifications (e.g., email, SMS, push) */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Preferred theme (e.g., light, dark) */,
  "notification_toggle" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if notifications are enabled */,
  "market_news_subscription" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is subscribed to market news */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
